title: taraxacum triangulare
intro: Taraxacum triangulare, also known as the triangular dandelion or triangular hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Taraxacum triangulare include reducing inflammation and improving liver function, as well as acting as a natural diuretic to help with fluid retention. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum triangulare can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and urinary tract infections.
